title: Coords Action Bar
description: Adds simple coords displayer on your action bar space
body:
# 📍 **Coords Action Bar**

> Minimalistic player coordinates displayed directly in the **Action Bar**.

✨ _Clean_ • _Simple_ • _No HUD clutter_ ✨

Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

---

## 🧭 **What this mod does**

This mod shows your player coordinates at the bottom of the screen in the **Action Bar** like this:

**X | Y | Z**

- Coordinates only
- White text
- Updates in real time
- No extra HUD elements
- Perfect for survival, building, and navigation

---

## 🔄 **Smart Action Bar behavior**

If another message appears in the **Action Bar** (for example from the game or another mod), **Coords Action Bar automatically moves its coordinates slightly above** so nothing overlaps.

As soon as the other message disappears, the coordinates return to their normal position.

---

## ⚙️ **In-game settings & localization**

The mod includes a settings screen:

- You have to use [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) to open mod settings by pressing **Coords Action Bar** icon in the mod list
- Most settings are translated into many languages
- Simple and clean configuration

---

## 💡 **Why use this?**

- No need to open F3
- Keeps your screen clean
- Easy to read and note coordinates
- Fits perfectly into a vanilla-style experience

## 🔁 **Feedback**

---

If you found bugs or crashes you always can DM me on my 
[discord](https://discord.com/users/1498679221210583040)
